creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Frank Could you update your Bugzilla email to match the current port MAINTAINER line such that we can verify maintainership. 

Matching bugzilla/maintainer lines is also necessary for our auto-assigner to work

If you could also confirm the port passes QA (poudriere, portlint in particular), that would also be great: 

  https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/testing/
